propositions: The duplicated command/tool/config catalogs in README.md should be removed and replaced with short pointers linking to the generated CLI and MCP references.
The CLI command catalog (the fenced block listing ~28 rebar <cmd> lines under ## CLI) must be genuinely removed, not merely re-linked, and the README must be shorter as a result.
The README must retain all front-door narrative sections including what/why, install, and tested quickstart without gutting conceptual CLI narrative.
README must contain no dead relative links to markdown files.
This ticket is sequenced after the CLI/MCP reference generators land so links point at real generated pages.
The acceptance criteria was recalibrated from a <=500 line proxy to a deterministic catalog-removal check plus net line reduction.
